primary_reason: Risk overall_severity=block: directly overlaps user's live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long strategy (long, channel=*, OI-rising condition), and top_trader_position_ratio has documented publish-lag leakage. Co-firing on same symbol/time would breach 5–10% per-trade sizing at $1000 capital. Resubmit with hard exclusion rule and fixed pre-optimization lookback window.

Quant sample_size_verdict=too_few (zero evaluable triggers under standard harness scoring — suppressors require counterfactual evaluation infrastructure not confirmed available); plus wildcard burst_count_* and undefined cross-channel premium_bps semantics. Defer until harness counterfactual support is built.

Risk overall_severity=block (live conflict with BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long, same long-momentum-OI signal family) compounded by Quant sample_size_verdict=too_few (effective n<12 after temporal-cluster correction) and uncomputable wildcard fields burst_count_* and pretrend_*. Multiple independent blockers.
